一个世界，人才济济，他们没有法律秩序。
一局游戏，全在看戏，杀人放火坑害自己。
安生完成任务这并无乐趣，他想，可以引导同伴构成一场闹剧。
他称，这场循环没有意义，倒不如炸列车来的有趣。
你说，我们住进那间公寓，同保安一起欣赏好戏。
你看，他们团聚在一起，虚假道着仁义礼智信。
嗯，你问身为开发者的我有什么感想？
我的想法是，开发游戏一定要做市场调研，不然全是疯魔的玩家只能留下悔意。
啊……这该死的世界，早晚将其毁去。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3f0e4bed0272b3ad001fde5e5eed1577~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"寻鹭倾羽","author_id":"","book_id":"7334996975315586110","book_name":"我一开发者你让我参与惊悚游戏？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7335360532888683070","read_count":"557","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"334653"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"155","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,灵异,无女主,惊悚游戏,无后宫,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d57ca3af1d4076655a93d14cdd3b3d94~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319516&x-signature=OHbsDzL5HK%2BpF4zwcOxOr3sIxqc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1459771355967383","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelap
